features.name: combinatorial_always_with_explicit_sensitivity_list
features.description: Code should include a combinatorial always block using an explicit sensitivity list with 'or' instead of the wildcard @*

features.name: signal_misinterpreted_as_clock_in_sensitivity
features.description: Code should include a data signal appearing in a sensitivity list that Verilator incorrectly infers as a clock source

features.name: dual_always_wrapper_combo_seq_selection
features.description: Code should include generated wrapper with both combinatorial always @* and sequential always @(posedge/negedge) blocks that select between seq and combo results based on sequence numbers

features.name: output_selection_between_combo_and_seq_results
features.description: Code should include a multiplexer selecting between sequential and combinatorial results based on sequence number comparison where seq result being newer forces output to seq value
